cta.heading: Book a boiler repair visit
cta.text: If the problem keeps returning or your heating has stopped, book a proper diagnosis from a Gas Safe engineer.

faq.question: Is this something I should ignore for now?
faq.answer: No. Boiler and heating faults usually get worse if the underlying cause is left unresolved, especially if the boiler is shutting down or leaking.

faq.question: Can I safely diagnose the internal fault myself?
faq.answer: No. You can carry out basic visual checks, but internal boiler parts and gas-related work should be left to a qualified engineer.

faq.question: Will this automatically mean I need a new boiler?
faq.answer: Not always. Many common faults can be repaired once the real cause has been identified.
